series_metadata.series_description: Ohio Civil Rights Commission and EEO Office documents containing complaints and hearing information for compliance purposes; quarterly computer printout listing each commission employee by department, classification, race and sex; reports documenting the status of minorities and women by classification, and analyses of data received from employees who are exiting the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If a paper version of a record exist, scan and retain the record electronically, then dispose of paper. ; Electronic: Retain 7 years, then delete, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
